name: libaprutil1-dbd-sqlite3
title: libaprutil1-dbd-sqlite3
summary: Apache Portable Runtime Utility Library - SQLite3 Driver
description:
Apache Portable Runtime Utility Library - SQLite3 Driver
APR is Apache's Portable Runtime Library, designed to be a support library
that provides a predictable and consistent interface to underlying
platform-specific implementations.
.
APR Util is a utilities library implemented on top of apr, providing database
access, xml parsing, and other useful functionality.
.
This package contains the SQLite3 database driver.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libaprutil1-dbd-sqlite3 because Apache Portable Runtime Utility Library - SQLite3 Driver.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libaprutil1-dbd-sqlite3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libaprutil1-dbd-sqlite3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libaprutil1-dbd-sqlite3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
